title: Why HOME Went Up Yesterday
summary: HOME was one of the strongest crypto movers yesterday, gaining 27.0% over 24 hours while attracting active market participation.
reasons: The token ranked among the strongest 24-hour gainers with a 27.0% move.

The move may reflect renewed momentum interest as traders rotated into recent outperformers.
